/CAL: STATUS OF CASES/X: ATTORNEY RUFUS COLE APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE GOLDEN GATE REGIONAL CENTER,/X: ON 10-28-09, THE 1370,1PC COMMITMENT IN THIS CASE WAS ORDERED VACATED BY THE HONORABLE JUDGE MARY MORGAN,/X: ON 10-29-09, THE HONORABLE JUDGE JOHN DEARMAN SIGNED AN AMENDED ORDER JUDICIALLY COMMITTING THIS DEFENDANT TO THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF DEVELOPMENTAL SERVICESFOR SUITABLE PLACEMENT, TREATMENT AND REHABILITATION SERVICES PURSUANT TOSECTION 6500WI,/CTORD: THE STAY ON TRANSFER OF THIS DEFENDANT IMPOSED ON 10-14-09 BY JUDGEEMARY MORGAN IS NOW LIFTED,/X: THIS DEFENDANT IS NOW ORDERED TO THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF DEVELOPMENTAL SERVICES FOR PERMANENT PLACEMENT WITH PORTERVILLE DEVELOPMENTAL CENTERPURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED BYJUDGE DEARMANN ON 10-29-09,/MO PC 1385: IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE /MHPORT/

/CAL: REVIEW OF POLICE REPORTS AND CTS CALCULATION/X: THE DEFENDANT HAS CUSTODY CREDITS OF 197 DAYS IN THIS CASE/X: THE COURT WILL CONSIDER DISMISSING THE CHARGES IN LIEU OF THE FACT THATTHE DAMAGES DONE DO NOT RISE TO THELEVEL OF FELONY CHARGES,/CTORD: THE 1370,01PC COMMITMENT TO PORTERVILLE ISVACATED/X: THE DEFENDANT WILL BE ORDERED TO PORTERVILLE AS PER 6500WI/X:FUTURE PROGRESS REPORTS WILL GO TO THE CIVIL MENTAL HEALTH COURT,/CONTD:STATUS OF CASES AND POSSIBLE DISMISSAL IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE/
